temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with white hair, wearing a grey suit, watches from behind as another man in a black, studded leather jacket walks away. The scene is dimly lit with a strong green and blue color grade, creating a tense, noir-like atmosphere. The man in the leather jacket has his head bowed. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious relationship between the two characters. The man in the suit is observing the other, who seems to be moving away or being led away.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A tense, rhythmic, and percussive score begins, building suspense.)
(00:03-00:05) The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the grey suit. He has a stern, worried, and intense expression on his face as he watches the other man. His brow is furrowed, and his eyes are wide with concern or anger. (Storyline: This shot emphasizes the emotional stakes of the situation, revealing the man in the suit's deep concern or anger, which contrasts with the other man's stoic departure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, percussive music continues, heightening the dramatic tension.)
